---
title: "Welcome to my Website!"
image: images/Headshot1.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/allanalmaraz/
---

Hello, my name is Allan Almaraz. I am a first-generation graduate student pursuing my Master of Science in Business Analytics (MSBA) at the University of California, Irvine (UCI), with a passion for using data to inform decisions and drive meaningful change. This is my professional portfolio, where you can explore who I am, my experience, and the projects I have worked on. Welcome, and please take a look around!

```{=html}
<style>
:root {
  --fs-title: 1rem;
  --fs-body:  0.95rem;
  --fs-small: 0.85rem;
  --c-title:  #1a1a1a;
  --c-body:   #444;
  --lh:       1.6;
}
.nav-cards {display: flex; gap: 1.2em; margin-top: 2.5em;}
.nav-card {
  flex: 1; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 1.4em 1.6em; text-decoration: none; color: inherit;
  transition: box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
}
.nav-card:hover {box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.10); border-color: #999; text-decoration: none;}
.nav-card h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.4em 0;
  font-size: var(--fs-title); font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--c-title); line-height: var(--lh);
}
.nav-card p {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: var(--fs-small); color: var(--c-body); line-height: var(--lh);
}
.three-col-wrapper {display: flex; gap: 1.5em; margin: 1em 0;}
.three-col-box {
  flex: 1; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 1.2em 1.5em; background: #f8f8f8;
}
.three-col-box h4 {
  margin: 0 0 0.8em 0;
  font-size: var(--fs-title); font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--c-title); line-height: var(--lh);
}
.three-col-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6em; padding: 0.3em 0;
  font-size: var(--fs-small); color: var(--c-body); line-height: var(--lh);
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
}
.three-col-item:last-child {border-bottom: none;}
.three-col-dot {width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #2563eb; flex-shrink: 0;}
</style>

<div class="nav-cards">
  <a class="nav-card" href="about.html">
    <h3>About Me →</h3>
    <p>My background, values, and what drives me as a first-generation graduate student. Includes a personal timeline of key milestones.</p>
  </a>
  <a class="nav-card" href="experience.html">
    <h3>Experience →</h3>
    <p>My professional roles, the skills I have built, and what I contributed and learned across each position.</p>
  </a>
  <a class="nav-card" href="projects.html">
    <h3>Projects →</h3>
    <p>Analytical projects in predictive modeling, data visualization, and forecasting — each with findings, methodology, and takeaways.</p>
  </a>
</div>
```


###
## Personal Mission Statement

I believe data has the power to move organizations forward. My goal is to work for the kinds of companies that show up in people's everyday lives, the brands they eat at, wear, root for, and learn from. I find purpose in knowing that my analysis could shape how these organizations make decisions, and that the results would be visible in the world around me. Whether supporting a restaurant brand, an apparel company, or a university, I want to be the analyst who turns complex data into decisions that actually change how things are done.

## Goals & Target Opportunities

Through my MSBA program and professional experience, I have built a growing toolkit centered on data analysis and business strategy. My goal is to bring that toolkit to companies that people interact with every day, where the work of an analyst is connected to something real and tangible. By deepening my expertise in SQL, Python, Tableau, and Power BI, I want to bridge the analytical and strategic sides of a business. With a graduation date of June 2026, I am actively pursuing internships and entry-level analyst roles in financial, marketing, and business analytics across industries like food service, apparel, higher education, and consumer goods.

#### 

```{=html}
<div class="three-col-wrapper">
  <div class="three-col-box">
    <h4>Target Roles</h4>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Financial Analyst</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Budget Analyst</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Marketing Analyst</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Supply Chain Analyst</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Business Strategy Analyst</div>
  </div>
  <div class="three-col-box">
    <h4>Target Industries</h4>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Restaurant &amp; Food Service</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Higher Education</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Local Government</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Consumer Packaged Goods</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Apparel</div>
  </div>
  <div class="three-col-box">
    <h4>Target Regions</h4>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Ventura County</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Santa Barbara County</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Sacramento County</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Orange County</div>
  </div>
</div>
```
